title: Accelerator Mod
description: Adds blocks that accelerate other blocks
body:
# About
This mod adds blocks which accelerate adjacent blocks (by ticking them every tick). The accelerators don't stack with each other, regardless of type or count.
 
## Accelerator

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acff5b2966fd331af6de80c1f54268399b0e20b6.png)

Always active, provides +50% boost in a 3x3x3 area around it.

## Fueled Accelerator

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab457618df511a51f7fdfe09c79152f9c68b6408.png)

Active when fueled, consumes fuel at twice the rate of a furnace, provides +100% boost in a 3x3x3 zone.

## Configuration
The tick rate boost values can be configured in-game or via json, since version 0.3.0 of the mod.
